caption: The video captures a man performing live music in front of an audience. He is seated and playing an acoustic guitar while singing into a microphone. The man is wearing glasses, a white shirt, and a black vest adorned with decorative patterns. The setting appears to be indoors, with wooden blinds covering the windows in the background. The audience, visible from behind, consists of several people who seem engaged in the performance. The atmosphere suggests an intimate and focused musical event, possibly a small concert or a community gathering. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner of the screen, indicating the source or affiliation of the video.
